      • onMouseMove

        public void onMouseMove(MouseEvent m)
        Description copied from interface: MouseListener
        Once a MouseListener is registered, this method will be called every time a mouse is moved
        Specified by:
        onMouseMove in interface MouseListener
        Overrides:
        onMouseMove in class SaccoWindow
        Parameters:
        m - - An object containing information about the event. Useful methods include m.getX() and m.getY()
